description: Outlaw motorcycle club based in New Zealand, founded in Auckland in 1967 or 1968. One of the largest motorcycle gangs in New Zealand, with membership largely of Māori and Pacific Island ethnicities. Involved in drug dealing, theft, rape, and murder. Expanded into Australia in the 1980s.

country_links.evidence_quote: They expanded into Australia in the 1980s, later setting up a chapter in Brisbane in 1998.
country_links.context: The Highway 61 Motorcycle Club expanded into Australia and set up a chapter in Brisbane.
